name: Dimension Omega
short_description: Explore, survive and escape the numerous levels of Dimension Omega in order to return to the real world in a creepy, liminal and eerie First-Person-Singleplayer experience while avoiding various terrifying entities that lurk in the shadows, waiting for you...
detailed_description:
Explore the numerous, liminal and eerie levels that can be found in Dimension Omega. Each level has its own characteristics ranging from seemingly harmless to absolutely deadly and terrifying. Your goal is to escape all the levels of this dimension in order to return to Dimension Alpha, the real world. Explore, survive and escape this place before the various entities find you that lurk in the shadows, waiting for you...

You start off in the first level of Dimension Omega: Level 0
Find the an exit door to leave the level and enter the next one. Who knows what awaits you in the next Level?...

There are four possible kinds of Levels that you can find: Positive numbered levels, negative numbered levels, decimal levels and numberless levels.
You'll need to face various dangers and environments. At least if you want to survive and return to the real world... There are over 45 unique levels that will push you to your limits.

The game is partly inspired by the backrooms creepypasta and you may find some similarities.

supported_languages:
English*, German, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Ukrainian, French, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
